text: A person who manufactures or sells a Class 3 electric bicycle shall ensure that the bicycle is equipped with a speedometer.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 664. Standards for Elec. Bicycles
##### § 664.004 — Speedometer

A person who manufactures or sells a Class 3 electric bicycle shall ensure that the bicycle is equipped with a speedometer.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 485 (H.B.2188), Sec. 8, eff. September 1, 2019.*

subsections.text: A person who manufactures or sells a Class 3 electric bicycle shall ensure that the bicycle is equipped with a speedometer.
